name: HNS_SUBJECT_AREA_VL
query: SELECT HNS_SUBJECT_AREA_B.SUBJECT_AREA_ID, HNS_SUBJECT_AREA_B.SUBJECT_AREA_CODE, HNS_SUBJECT_AREA_B.DISPLAY_SEQUENCE, HNS_SUBJECT_AREA_B.DELETED_FLAG, HNS_SUBJECT_AREA_B.ENABLED_FLAG, HNS_SUBJECT_AREA_TL.SUBJECT_AREA_NAME, HNS_SUBJECT_AREA_B.CREATED_BY, HNS_SUBJECT_AREA_B.CREATION_DATE, HNS_SUBJECT_AREA_B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, HNS_SUBJECT_AREA_B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, HNS_SUBJECT_AREA_B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, HNS_SUBJECT_AREA_B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER FROM HNS_SUBJECT_AREA_B INNER JOIN HNS_SUBJECT_AREA_TL ON HNS_SUBJECT_AREA_B.SUBJECT_AREA_ID = HNS_SUBJECT_AREA_TL.SUBJECT_AREA_ID AND HNS_SUBJECT_AREA_TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
